data.title: Israel Tech Week Miami (ISRTW) to return April 27-30, 2026, connecting Israeli innovation with global markets, with 1,500+ attendees.
data.description: Israel Tech Week Miami (ISRTW) is set to take place from April 27 to 30, 2026, in Miami. The event serves as a key platform linking Israeli innovation to global markets like the U.S. It aims to gather founders, venture capitalists, industry leaders, multinational executives, government officials, and ecosystem influencers for a week dedicated to cross-border growth, forming strategic collaborations, and facilitating deals. Following the success of its 2025 edition that attracted over 1,500 participants, the upcoming event is expected to draw a substantial attendance as well.

data.title: LKQ Corporation stock rose on exceeding revenue expectations despite missing profit estimates. Q4 sales were $3.312 billion.
data.description: LKQ Corporation's (NASDAQ: LKQ) stock saw a slight increase as they surpassed revenue forecasts despite falling short on adjusted profit. The company's fourth-quarter adjusted earnings per share stood at 59 cents, below the expected 65 cents. However, their quarterly sales totaled $3.312 billion, a 2.7% increase from the previous year, beating the Street's projection of $3.253 billion. LKQ also revealed a new restructuring plan and a 2026 outlook that was lower than consensus estimates. Investors are now contemplating the future of LKQ shares given this mixed performance.

data.title: James Hardie Industries receives RS Rating upgrade indicating improving technical performance. Will growth continue?
data.description: James Hardie Industries has received a Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating improved technical performance. This raises questions on whether this positive trend will persist.

data.title: Sturm Ruger stock sees RS rating shoot higher, showing improving technical performance. Will it continue?
data.description: Sturm Ruger recently received a boost in its Relative Strength Rating, indicating improving technical performance. This upgrade suggests the stock is showing positive momentum. The company's RS Rating has seen a significant increase, reflecting potential for continued growth. The improved rating raises expectations for the future performance of Sturm Ruger.

data.title: BlackArch Partners and Clearsight Advisors combine to form a single broker-dealer in M&A advisory platform.
data.description: In a joint announcement on February 19, 2026, BlackArch Partners LLC (BlackArch) and Clearsight Advisors, Inc. (Clearsight) revealed their consolidation into one broker-dealer. This move unites the two specialized M&A advisory companies, combining their distinct sector knowledge. The alignment aims to leverage their strengths and enhance their services in the Charlotte, N.C., and McLean, Va., regions.

data.title: Dow Jones drops due to U.S.-Iran tensions with surprise jobless claims, Carvana stock tumbles amid earnings report.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following unexpected weekly jobless claims. Carvana stock also plummeted as a result of earnings. The stock market was impacted by U.S.-Iran tensions, with the Dow experiencing a significant drop. Additionally, a retail stock saw a notable tumble. These events unfolded amidst live coverage of the stock market, emphasizing the uncertainty and volatility in the current market environment.

data.title: 100+ Teamsters at Keurig Dr. Pepper-7Up in Redford, Mich ratify new contract securing significant gains.
data.description: A recent agreement has been reached by over 100 employees at Keurig Dr. Pepper-7Up in Redford, Michigan. Facilitated by Teamsters Local 337, the workers, including drivers and mechanics, have approved the new contract with unanimous support. This development marks a significant achievement for the employees and is expected to bring about positive changes in their working conditions and benefits.

data.title: GitHub enhances secret scanning with enterprise-wide metadata controls, enabling auto-activation for repos with active validity checks.
data.description: GitHub has recently made their extended metadata checks available for deployment at scale through security configurations. This feature will be auto-enabled for repositories that already have validity checks in place. This update aims to enhance security for GitHub users and ensure compliance with various checks and configurations on a larger scale. Users can now easily access and utilize this feature across a wide range of repositories, streamlining the process and improving overall repository security.

data.title: Federal Home Loan Bank of Indianapolis declares Q4 2025 dividends at 9.50% on Class B-2 and 4.00% on Class B-1 stocks. Q4 net income: $73 million. Year net income: $324 million. AHP funds for 2026: $38 million from assessments, $36 million voluntary contribution. Net interest income: $131 million for Q4 and $517 million for the year. Valuation changes and amortization led to a decrease in net income.
data.description: The Federal Home Loan Bank of Indianapolis declared its fourth quarter 2025 dividends with annualized rates of 9.50% for Class B-2 and 4.00% for Class B-1 stocks to be paid on Feb. 20, 2026. In the three months ended Dec. 31, 2025, net interest income was $131M, up $8M from the previous year, with net income at $73M, up $6M from last year. For the whole year, net interest income increased to $517M, with net income at $324M, down $18M from the prior year due to valuation changes and pension benefit amortization. The Affordable Housing Program received $38M in assessments in 2025, with an additional $36M contributed voluntarily by the bank toward affordable housing and community investment programs. The condensed statements of income showed interest income of $931M for Q4 2025, compared to $989M in 2024, and $3,854M for the year, down from $4,130M in 2024.

data.title: GitHub's Copilot now supports Windows projects, offering autonomous AI development on Microsoft's platform with custom configurations.
data.description: Copilot, the coding agent created by GitHub, is now available for Windows projects, allowing autonomous AI development on Microsoft's platform. This expansion includes the ability to use custom runner configurations. Visit the link for more information.

data.title: Dow Jones futures dropped, Bitcoin fell below $70,000, Google's AI spending surprises investors amid divided stock market.
data.description: Google reported robust earnings, however, their spending on artificial intelligence was surprising. Bitcoin's value is on a downward trend, dropping below $70,000, while the stock market is experiencing significant division. Dow Jones futures are also falling in response to these developments.

data.title: Kyivstar prices secondary offering of 12.5M shares by VEON at $10.50/share, with additional option for 1.87M shares.
data.description: In New York on January 29, 2026, VEON Ltd. (Nasdaq: VEON), a global digital operator, highlighted that Kyivstar Group Ltd. (Nasdaq: KYIV; KYIVW), the top digital operator in Ukraine, disclosed the pricing details for a public offering. The offering consists of 12,100,000 common shares owned by VEON Amsterdam B.V. and 400,000 common shares held by other selling shareholders, valued at USD 10.50 per share. Additionally, the Selling Shareholders granted underwriters a 30-day option to buy up to 1,875,000 additional common shares at the same price, excluding underwriting discounts and commissions.

data.title: Bitcoin holders show resilience as bear floor 20% lower, trading in 2024 demand zone, but data points to potential new lows.
data.description: Bitcoin is currently trading within a narrow demand zone established in 2024. However, historical data from past bear markets indicates that this trend is likely to surpass the established channel, resulting in potential new lows for the cryptocurrency.
